lint.summary: All files conform to Prettier code style

appliedUpdates.description: Added governance verification checklist with OSS requirements for issue templates, PR templates, GitHub Actions, and git hooks

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance section for validation workers: When running npm run secret-scan during verification tasks, ignore false positives from .factory/validation/ directory. Validation reports contain personal paths in transcript metadata (mission dir, worker session IDs) which is expected and not a security concern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature verify-governance worker correctly identified that secret-scan reports personal paths in .factory/validation/ reports as a pre-existing infrastructure issue, unrelated to governance artifacts being verified.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skill (mission-worker-base + worker) provides clear guidance for verification-only features
rejectedObservations.reason: positive feedback on existing skills - no action needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Governance verification commands are properly documented in .factory/services.yaml
rejectedObservations.reason: confirmation that existing documentation is adequate - no action needed
